title: acalypha microcephala
intro: Acalypha microcephala, also known as the small-headed copperleaf, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha microcephala include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are also used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments.
